title: Just Trims for Netherite
description:
Now only the trims will remain from your netherite armor. Nice decoration for your skin.
Pretty cool, right?
body:
# What the resource pack does or adds:

This resource pack modifies netherite armor in Minecraft to display only its trims, turning the armor into a decorative element for your player skin. It exclusively affects netherite armor and supports all trim types, making it easy to distinguish players wearing netherite armor from those in diamond armor.
Why someone should want to download the resource pack:

![Example of the resource pack's functionality](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ab69e2090860c24be4f333c5aee0a4aa63c96c3.png)

This resource pack is perfect for players who want a stylish, minimalist look for their netherite armor, transforming it into a unique cosmetic feature. It enhances your character’s appearance while ensuring netherite armor stands out from diamond armor in multiplayer settings, adding both flair and functionality to your gameplay.
Critical information before downloading:

This is the first version of the resource pack, but it is fully functional and will receive future updates.
The resource pack only affects netherite armor and works with all armor trims.
For the best visual experience, OptiFine is highly recommended, though not required.
No additional features are planned at this time, but updates will continue to improve performance and compatibility.
